unit.comment: /*************************************************************************** * _ _ ____ _ * Project ___| | | | _ \| | * / __| | | | |_) | | * | (__| |_| | _ <| |___ * \___|\___/|_| \_\_____| * * Copyright (C) Daniel Stenberg, <daniel@haxx.se>, et al. * * This software is licensed as described in the file COPYING, which * you should have received as part of this distribution. The terms * are also available at https://curl.se/docs/copyright.html. * * You may opt to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute and/or sell * copies of the Software, and permit persons to whom the Software is * furnished to do so, under the terms of the COPYING file. * * This software is distributed on an "AS IS" basis, WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY * KIND, either express or implied. * * SPDX-License-Identifier: curl * ***************************************************************************/
/* The last 3 #include files should be in this order */

/* * checkheaders() checks the linked list of custom headers for a * particular header (prefix). Provide the prefix without colon! * * Returns a pointer to the first matching header or NULL if none matched. */

function.name: Curl_checkheaders
data_pending

unit.comment: /* * Check to see if CURLOPT_TIMECONDITION was met by comparing the time of the * remote document with the time provided by CURLOPT_TIMEVAL */

function.name: Curl_meets_timecondition

unit.comment: /** * Receive raw response data for the transfer. * @param data the transfer * @param buf buffer to keep response data received * @param blen length of `buf` * @param eos_reliable if EOS detection in underlying connection is reliable * @param err error code in case of -1 return * @return number of bytes read or -1 for error */

function.name: Curl_xfer_recv_resp
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, char *buf, size_t blen, bool eos_reliable, CURLcode *err)

unit.comment: /* * Go ahead and do a read if we have a readable socket or if * the stream was rewound (in which case we have data in a * buffer) */

function.name: readwrite_data
win_update_buffer_size
readwrite_upload
select_bits_paused

unit.comment: /* * Curl_readwrite() is the low-level function to be called when data is to * be read and written to/from the connection. */

function.name: Curl_readwrite

unit.comment: /* Curl_init_CONNECT() gets called each time the handle switches to CONNECT which means this gets called once for each subsequent redirect etc */

function.name: Curl_init_CONNECT

unit.comment: /* * Curl_pretransfer() is called immediately before a transfer starts, and only * once for one transfer no matter if it has redirects or do multi-pass * authentication etc. */

function.name: Curl_pretransfer
Curl_posttransfer

unit.comment: /* * Curl_follow() handles the URL redirect magic. Pass in the 'newurl' string * as given by the remote server and set up the new URL to request. * * This function DOES NOT FREE the given url. */

function.name: Curl_follow
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, char *newurl, /* the Location: string */ followtype type)

unit.comment:
/* Returns CURLE_OK *and* sets '*url' if a request retry is wanted.
NOTE: that the *url is malloc()ed. */

function.name: Curl_retry_request

unit.comment: /* * Curl_xfer_setup() is called to setup some basic properties for the * upcoming transfer. */

function.name: Curl_xfer_setup
function.parameter_list: ( struct Curl_easy *data, /* transfer */ int sockindex, /* socket index to read from or -1 */ curl_off_t size, /* -1 if unknown at this point */ bool getheader, /* TRUE if header parsing is wanted */ int writesockindex /* socket index to write to, it may very well be the same we read from. -1 disables */ )

function.name: Curl_xfer_write_resp
function.parameter_list: (struct Curl_easy *data, char *buf, size_t blen, bool is_eos)

function.name: Curl_xfer_write_done
Curl_xfer_send
Curl_xfer_recv
Curl_xfer_send_close
